candidate_grammar.boundary: All arrangement, selection and finite classification families produced from a registered canonical finite carrier by held choice, remainder and successor recurrence.
candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of carrier coverage, choice rule, provenance, duplication policy, symmetry identity, class accounting, recurrence closure and extra-formula status.

excluded_inputs: no random sampling as completeness evidence
no factorial or binomial answer table
intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of the complete 256-candidate product, its sole all-preserving survivor, closure properties and controls.
statement: Every admitted finite combinatorial family is generated by an explicit held-choice recurrence over a complete canonical carrier, preserves construction order and provenance, removes duplicates only by canonical form identity, and counts the resulting complete trace; selections include the structural empty One form rather than numerical zero.
title: Exact finite combinatorial generation
